videos.headline: Jeremiyah Love's 21-yard TD gives ND the late lead
videos.description: Jeremiyah Love breaks through up the middle to give Notre Dame a 20-13 lead with under two minutes remaining.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jeremiyah Love's 21-yard TD gives ND the late lead) 2024/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Notre Dame outlasts Texas A&M to grab road win in season opener
videos.description: No. 7 Notre Dame comes away with a 23-13 win over No. 20 Texas A&M in the teams' season opener.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Notre Dame outlasts Texas A&M to grab road win in season opener) 2024/08/31 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Dalton Brooks ejected for targeting after hit on Riley Leonard
videos.description: Texas A&M's Dalton Brooks is ejected in the first quarter after a targeting penalty vs. Notre Dame.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dalton Brooks ejected for targeting after hit on Riley Leonard) 2024/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Adon Shuler picks off Conner Weigman for Notre Dame
videos.description: Adon Shuler intercepts the misplaced pass from Conner Weigman to set up Notre Dame in good field position.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Adon Shuler picks off Conner Weigman for Notre Dame) 2024/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Xavier Watts grabs Notre Dame's second interception of the first half
videos.description: Xavier Watts picks off Conner Weigman just before half to set up Notre Dame near midfield.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Xavier Watts grabs Notre Dame's second interception of the first half) 2024/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jadarian Price races home for a 47-yard Notre Dame TD
videos.description: Jadarian Price bounces it to the outside and finds the end zone for a 47-yard touchdown run.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jadarian Price races home for a 47-yard Notre Dame TD) 2024/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Le'Veon Moss punches in the TD to tie the score for A&M
videos.description: Le'Veon Moss takes it up the middle and crosses the goal line to tie the score at 13-13 for Texas A&M.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Le'Veon Moss punches in the TD to tie the score for A&M) 2024/08/31 ESHEET
